training_status: Lifting weights with progressive overloads 2-3x a week, cardio on other days

benefits.description: Lost 60lbs over 8 months, lost 4 inches on waist
Gained 1/2 inch around biceps, can lift heavier than 8 months ago

protocol_notes: OP is researching adding Sermorelin or MOTS-C to help with stubborn fat loss and muscle gain. Already taking creatine. Has had testosterone tested and results were 'normal'. On Zepbound (tirzepatide) covered 90% by insurance. Considering TRT but concerned about shutting down natural testosterone production.
